## Evidence and rationale

Describe the problem, evidence, alternatives, and exact intended effect.

## Checklist

- [ ] I identified normative versus editorial changes.
- [ ] I disclosed relevant conflicts.
- [ ] I updated decisions, conformance material, fixtures, and changelog where applicable.
- [ ] My commits include DCO sign-off (`Signed-off-by:`).
- [ ] I am not self-approving or self-certifying this change.
